members.label: art
members.long_form_open_description: Large rectangular framed painting of sailboats on water with a dark wood/gilded frame; occupies most of the left third of the image near the camera, frame edge visible and textured, canvas shows muted beige/gray tones. Painting is flush on the left wall about 0.4 m from camera.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: At the left foreground, immediately left of the hallway opening; above baseboard and left of the corridor view

members.label: art
members.long_form_open_description: Large rectangular painting in a dark brown/wooden frame depicting sailboats on calm water in muted grays and browns. The frame is scuffed in places and occupies most of the left third of the image, mounted on the left wall about eye level. Edges of the frame are approximately 0.6–1.0 m from the camera, with the picture centered vertically in the wall space.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: Mounted on the left wall, directly left of the central hallway opening; left of the wooden floor and opposite the American flag on the right wall.
members.object_text_long: left sector | Large rectangular painting in a dark brown/wooden frame depicting sailboats on calm water in muted grays and browns.
